projects.name: Portfolio Site
projects.description: My personal portfolio site you are browsing right now. Built with Nextjs and TailwindCSS.

projects.name: Football Stadium
projects.description: List of Football Stadiums. Built with MERN stack. You can add, edit and delete stadiums once you are authenticated and authorized. You can also add reviews for stadiums.

projects.name: AI-PDF-Query-App
projects.description: A PDF query app where users can upload a PDF and ask questions about the content of the PDF. Built with FastApi, Langchian and React stack using Gemini API .

projects.name: Langraph-Restaurant-Booking-App
projects.description: A restaurant booking app where users can book tables at a restaurant. Built with FastApi, Langchian, Langraph, Redux and React stack using Gemini API .
